title: Bodygraph PDF extraction (MVP)
description:
Resumen:
- MVP: solo PDF de MyHumanDesign + Genetic Matrix (tropical).
- No APIs externas por mismatch (Design Moon).
- PDFs de referencia en test-assets/bodygraph-sources/.
- Validar parseo 100% determinista con texto extraíble.

Contexto:
- Docs: docs/bodygraph-extraction-notes.md
- Parsing spec: /Users/brmontero/astral/.beads/docs/BDG-PDF-PARSING.md
- PDFs: test-assets/bodygraph-sources/myhumandesign-chart.pdf, test-assets/bodygraph-sources/chart1773003080.pdf
- Reglas: aceptar solo PDFs oficiales, rechazar todo lo demás, fail-closed.

Spike (hecho):
- Ambos PDFs tienen texto extraíble.
- MyHumanDesign: 26 gate.line exactos en orden.
- Genetic Matrix: 26 gate.line detectables tras anchor 'www.geneticmatrix.com' (filtrar 0.1 coords).
- Orden de planetas difiere entre proveedores; requiere mapping por template.
notes: HANDOFF: Added PDF-only decision doc + fixtures. Verified both PDFs have extractable text and deterministic 26 gate.line lists. Added parsing spec at .beads/docs/BDG-PDF-PARSING.md with anchor/planet order per provider. Next: implement contract + parsers + validation + integration per tasks jr9.1–jr9.5.

title: Define PDF-only input contract + rejection UX
description: Scope: document accepted sources (MyHumanDesign, Genetic Matrix), formats (PDF only), rejection reasons, and user instructions for re-export. Define canonical planet order per provider.
notes: HANDOFF: Documented PDF-only input contract and rejection UX copy in .beads/docs/BDG-PDF-CONTRACT.md, linked from .beads/docs/BDG-PDF-PARSING.md. Planet order per provider captured. No code changes.
close_reason: Doc contract + UX rejection copy for PDF-only input

title: Implement PDF parsing: MyHumanDesign template
description: Parse text deterministically (no OCR). Extract 26 gate.line values in order and map to planet list for MyHumanDesign. Use fixtures from test-assets/bodygraph-sources/myhumandesign-chart.pdf.
notes: HANDOFF: Added deterministic MyHumanDesign PDF parser using pdfjs-dist text extraction. New helpers in backend/src/hd-pdf/pdf-text.ts and backend/src/hd-pdf/myhumandesign.ts (extract 26 gate.line values, map to planet order, set isPersonality by index, throw on count mismatch). Added pdfjs-dist dependency to backend/package.json.

title: Implement PDF parsing: Genetic Matrix template
description: Parse text deterministically (no OCR). Use anchor 'www.geneticmatrix.com' and extract 26 gate.line values (filter 0.1 coords). Map to Genetic Matrix planet order (Sun, Earth, Moon, N.Node, S.Node, Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune, Pluto). Fixtures in test-assets/bodygraph-sources/chart1773003080.pdf.
notes: HANDOFF: Added deterministic Genetic Matrix PDF parser in backend/src/hd-pdf/genetic-matrix.ts. Uses anchor 'www.geneticmatrix.com', filters 0.1 noise, expects 26 gate.line values, maps to provider-specific planet order and sets isPersonality by index.
close_reason: Implement deterministic Genetic Matrix PDF parser

title: Add strict validation + fail-closed extraction
description: Validate counts (26 activations), planet list, gate/line ranges, and consistency (channels/centers). Reject on any mismatch with clear errors. Add tests/fixtures for both PDFs.
notes: HANDOFF: Implemented strict PDF validation (gate/line ranges, planet counts per side, channel/center consistency) and shared channels in backend/src/hd-channels.ts. Parsers now validate + fail-closed. Added fixtures tests in backend/src/hd-pdf/pdf-fixtures.test.ts. Tests pass via: cd backend && node --import tsx/esm --test src/hd-pdf/pdf-fixtures.test.ts (root run fails to resolve tsx). Commit: 862131b. Next: integrate upload flow + UX (jr9.5), push/land if approved.

title: Integrate into upload flow + user messaging
description: Wire PDF-only extraction into backend upload/extraction flow. Add user-facing errors and instructions to re-export from MyHumanDesign/Genetic Matrix. Update docs.
notes: HANDOFF: Integrated PDF-only HD extraction path using deterministic parsers + provider detection, added user-facing errors, blocked non-PDF HD uploads, updated onboarding copy/accept and API error parsing, updated docs. Next: run tests and push if desired.
close_reason: Integrated PDF-only upload flow + user messaging

title: HD Transit Refactor
description:
Objetivo: Corregir el cálculo de tránsitos HD, agregar cruce tránsito↔usuario, eliminar astrología natal.

Contexto: Se descubrió un bug crítico en el offset del Rave Mandala (302° faltante), 2 canales de Integración faltantes (10-34, 34-57), y el cruce tránsito↔bodygraph estaba delegado 100% al LLM. Este epic corrige todo y refactoriza la app para ser HD-only.

Descartados: Mantener astrología natal como feature secundaria — decisión de producto de enfocarse solo en HD.

Restricciones: No romper el deploy en Fly.io, no cambiar la estructura de DB (perfiles viejos con natal siguen funcionando).

Criterio de éxito: Gate calculations correctos (5 test cases), 36/36 canales, analyzeTransitImpact() funcionando, build limpio, natal removido de UI y prompts.
notes: 2026-03-08: Branch pusheado. Fases 1-6 DONE. Build limpio. Pendiente: PR + smoke test manual.
